title: The Boykisser Mod
description: Boykissers have invaded your Minecraft world ..and it looks like they've made a living here!
body:
# **The Boykisser Mod**

## Boykissers have invaded your Minecraft world ..and it looks like they've made a living here!  
You can find the new **Boykisser mobs** at random biomes, exploring the world or in their own **Boykisser biomes** with _pink grass_ and even _pink trees_! 

![The new Boykisser biome with massive spruce trees.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28de77b4334a57c608a08c9402406adbe0e8fd18.png)

Also make sure to look out for the new **Boykisser ore** that when mined and smelted can create **Boykisser Ingots** which can be made into the new **Boykisser tools** and even it's own _armor set_!

### "But what's this magical orb?"

A new mysterious orb has appeared on your Minecraft world... and it looks like it's pretty rare and powerful! 

The Boykisser Orb can be crafted with 8 Boykisser Ingots surrounding a Netherite Ingot. See Below:

![The crafting recipe for the Boykisser Orb.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/107e588fafe76625a0063b2500e73f7fbc88981b.png)

### "New potions?" ###

It looks like there's new potions! The Potion of Gay gives the player the LGBTQIA+ poiton effect. (The same effect given when wearing the Boykisser armor)

The other potion... well.. THE POTION OF HOMOPHOBIA! (please help me i'm sorry) The potion of Homophobia gives the player less block reach, less attack damage, and slowness.
